title: Google Cloud Project API Quota Issue
symptom: The Google Business Profile node does not return data due to a quota of 0 on the API, preventing access to the required information.
applies_when: Using a new Google Cloud project
Attempting to access Google Business Profile API
not_this_if: The project has been approved for API access
root_cause: New Google Cloud projects are initially set with a quota of 0 for most APIs. Users must submit a form to Google to request basic API access, which is a requirement for first-time users.
fix_steps: Submit the required form to Google for basic API access.
Obtain your project number using the command 'gcloud projects describe [yourprojectID]'.
agent_instruction: Submit the form for basic API access to Google and retrieve your project number.
